---
description: "Route processing changes to the canonical contract and extension procedure"
applyTo: "wandas/processing/**"

# Copilot processing route

Apply the canonical invariants in [`AGENTS.md`](../../AGENTS.md). For a new or
changed numerical Operation, public Frame integration, Recipe support, or
related tests, load
[`wandas-frame-operation-extension`](../../.agents/skills/wandas-frame-operation-extension/SKILL.md).
This file only supplies Copilot path-based routing.
